donations.name: Amelie's Fund
donations.description: Support Amelie's project — funds to install a small lift so Amelie can access the upper floor.

en.name: Amelie's Wonderful Lift Fund
en.description: This campaign supports Amelie — the funds will go toward installing a small lift to help Amelie reach the upper floor safely.

de.name: Amelies fabelhafter Lift
de.description: Diese Kampagne unterstützt Amelie — die Spenden werden für die Installation eines kleinen Lifts verwendet, damit Amelie sicher die obere Etage erreichen kann.
